//: Shared TypeScript base configuration for Spaarke client surfaces (Code Pages, PCF, Office Add-ins, shared libs). Established by ai-spaarke-ai-workspace-UI-r1 brittleness remediation (2026-06-09) to centralize strict compiler settings across 20+ surfaces. Each surface extends this base and adds its own `jsx`, `baseUrl`, `paths`, `include`, `references`, and `typeRoots` as appropriate. noUnusedLocals/noUnusedParameters intentionally OFF at base — shared libs (@spaarke/ai-context, @spaarke/ai-outputs, @spaarke/ai-widgets, @spaarke/events-components, @spaarke/ui-components) have ~90 pre-existing hygiene findings; surface a `tsc --noEmit` gate to catch real runtime bugs (ReferenceError from undestructured props, TS2307 missing modules, type mismatches) without blocking on dead-code warnings. Phase B follow-up will fix shared-lib hygiene and re-enable these at base.
